headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Ameren, Lowers Price Target to $120
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeremy Tonet   maintains Ameren (NYSE:AEE) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $123 to $120.

raw.headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Ameren, Lowers Price Target to $120
raw.summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeremy Tonet   maintains Ameren (NYSE:AEE) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $123 to $120.

headline: Logan County panel backs 90-day data center moratorium, Hut 8 says delay could sink project
summary: Hut 8 warns a new 90-day moratorium on data center construction in Logan County, Illinois, could end its proposed $5 billion project because a utility agreement with Ameren would expire.

raw.headline: Logan County panel backs 90-day data center moratorium, Hut 8 says delay could sink project
raw.summary: Hut 8 warns a new 90-day moratorium on data center construction in Logan County, Illinois, could end its proposed $5 billion project because a utility agreement with Ameren would expire.
